lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ahoy Cap'n!

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Ahoy there!

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: Avast ye scurvy swabs!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Don't mind me parrot, he's Cracked Jenny's Tea Cup!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: This, me hearty, is the entrance to the Brimhaven Agility Arena!

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: I were diggin for buried treasure when I found it! Amazed I was! It was a sight to behold!

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: Buried treasure!

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: It were the biggest thing I'd ever seen! It must've been at least a league from side to side!

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: It made me list, I were that excited!

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: Get on with it!

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: I'd found a huge cave with all these platforms. I reckon it be an ancient civilisation that made it. I had to be mighty careful as there was these traps everywhere! Dangerous it was!

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: Danger! Danger!

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Entrance is only 200 coins!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I do in the arena?

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Well, me hearty, it's simple. Ye can cross between two platforms by using the traps or obstacles strung across 'em. Try and make your way to the pillar that is indicated by the flashing arrow.

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Ye receive tickets for tagging more than one pillar in a row. So ye won't get a ticket from the first pillar but ye will for every platform ye tag in a row after that.

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: If ye miss a platform ye will miss out on the next ticket so try and get every platform you can! When ye be done, take the tickets to Jackie over there and she'll exchange them for more stuff!

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: Tag when green light means tickets! Tag when red light means green light!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to use the Agility Arena, please.

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Aye, entrance be 200 coins.

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: Pieces of eight!

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: A word of warning me hearty! There are dangerous traps down there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the money on me at the moment.

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: *squawk*

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: No coins, no entrance!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here's 200 coins.

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: May the wind be in ye sails!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me a bit about the Skillcape of Agility, please?

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Aye, to be sure! The Skillcape of Agility be the symbol of the master of dexterity! Providing weight reduction, one who wears it can climb like a cat, run like the wind and jump like...err, well, jump like a jumping thing!

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Now, be there anything else ye'd like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I buy a Skillcape of Agility, please?

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Most certainly, having it equipped reduces your weight and I think it will really suit you. All that remains to be done is pay me 99000 gold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't afford that.

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: So sad, too bad. Go and pickpocket some wealthy people and come back here once you're richer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Certainly, here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Excellent! That cape really does suit you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I buy a Skillcape of Agility, please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: Try again! Try again!

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: Squawk! Pieces of eight!

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Can I help you with something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm here about a treasure trail...

lines.speaker: Cap'n Izzy No-Beard
lines.text: Ah, you'll be wanting to talk to him then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Him?

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: Avast!

lines.speaker: Parrot
lines.text: Answer this and I'll give you treasure!
